title: BBAI Director Dorothy Hayes Sells 15,000 Shares on May 8, 2026
text: BigBear.ai director Dorothy Hayes executed a significant insider transaction on May 8, 2026. She disposed of 15,000 shares of BBAI common stock at $4.11 per share. The sale generated $61,575 in proceeds. Hayes retained 204,150 shares after the transaction. This insider sale activity is notable as part of a broader pattern in which BigBear.ai has seen 18 insider sales over the past 12 months with zero insider purchases. The timing of Hayes' sale came shortly after the company announced strong Q1 results featuring margin expansion to 34% and backlog growth. However, insider sales routinely occur for personal financial reasons unrelated to a company's outlook. The transaction adds to recent insider trading activity by other executives, including Pamela Joyce Braden who offloaded 80,000 shares in March 2026 valued at $320,000.
